signals.snippet: Am not happy with this team

cause_analysis.narrative: Absolute Braids Salon churned on 2026-03-12 after 117 days with Zoca. Sentiment turned negative on 2025-12-31 (app_chat) — first complaint keyword: "not happy with". Classification: service complaint. Negative signals appeared but no explicit cancellation request.
recommendations: [Escalation] First negative sentiment on 2025-12-31 via app_chat. Triggering a same-day AM touchpoint on any negative keyword would have caught this.
[Sentiment] Add an automated sentiment alerting layer over app_chat/email that pages the AM when negative keywords appear.
